name: debug
description: Code debugging utilities: inspect variables, assert conditions, time and benchmark commands

inspect.description: Inspect a variable: show name, type, length, and value

typeof.description: Return the Python type name of a variable

dump.description: Pretty-print a variable's value as formatted JSON

assert.description: Assert a value is truthy, or equals an expected value. Raises SVTException on failure.

assert_eq.description: Assert two values are equal. Raises SVTException on failure.

assert_ne.description: Assert two values are not equal. Raises SVTException on failure.

time.description: Time the execution of a command and print elapsed ms

bench.description: Benchmark a command N times, print avg/min/max ms

echo.description: Echo all received args and options back — useful for debugging call sites

vars.description: List all current variables (delegates to var:list)

stack.description: Show the current variable scope stack depth

trace.description: Trace-execute lines from a block, printing each line before running it
